Compute effective effort per fleet

Source: R/tune_fleets.R
compute_effort_by_fleet.Rd

For each fleet, calculates the share of base_effort that overlaps with viable habitat (b0_p > 0) within the fleet\'s fishing grounds. Effort is a fleet-level quantity (not species-specific): a fleet exerts one pool of effort that affects each species differently through catchability.

Usage

compute_effort_by_fleet(fauna_species, fleets)

Arguments

fauna_species

A single fauna element (used only for b0_p).

fleets

A fleet list (output of create_fleet).

Value

Named numeric vector of effective effort per fleet.
